missing_main_functions.description: Handles the maintenance and update of the disposable email domain list, including fallback behavior if the list is unavailable.

missing_main_functions.function_name: Rate Limit Reset and Lockout Recovery
missing_main_functions.description: Handles the automatic reset of rate limits after the rolling window and the recovery from lockout after 30 minutes.

missing_sub_functions.description: Handles the user experience when clicking an expired link, including guidance to request a new link.
Verifies that error messages are correctly localized (Vietnamese as specified) and consistent across all endpoints.
Handles the lifecycle of unverified accounts, including potential deletion after a certain period to free up email for re-registration.

duplicate_functions.description: Error message validation for registration is partially duplicated in FUNC003 and the sub-functions of FUNC001. Consider consolidating error message tests under FUNC003 only.

unclear_categories.reason: The test intent is ambiguous about whether re-registration with the same email is allowed after verification link expiry. The requirement does not specify this behavior, so the category should be marked as exploratory or require clarification.
The test intent mentions 'may notify the user or support' which is vague. The expected behavior for email delivery failure is not defined in the requirements, making this category unclear.

recommendations: Add a main function for Disposable Email Domain Management to cover maintenance and fallback behavior.
Add a main function for Rate Limit Reset and Lockout Recovery to explicitly test the automatic reset and recovery mechanisms.
Add a sub-function for Verification Link Expiry Notification to cover the user experience when an expired link is clicked.
Add a sub-function for Error Message Localization to ensure all error messages are correctly localized and consistent.
Add a sub-function for Account Deletion or Expiration Policy to clarify the lifecycle of unverified accounts.
Consolidate duplicate error message validation tests from FUNC001 into FUNC003 to avoid redundancy.
Clarify the test intent for CAT029 by either defining the expected behavior or marking it as exploratory.
Clarify the test intent for CAT027 by defining the expected system behavior when email delivery fails.
Consider adding test categories for edge cases such as very long email addresses, special characters in email local part, and password with only special characters.
Add test categories for security aspects like SQL injection, XSS in email/password fields, and brute force protection on login attempts.
